text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the Kikuka Sho, Narita Taishin spends
her days in a listless melancholy, shirking both
training and school—until her spirits are stirred by
a basketball game.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She realizes that the young, redheaded player on
TV was the one who confronted her before the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The girl tells of how she received the courage to
never give up from a certain person—someone
who is stronger than anyone she knows.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Winning Ticket explains that Narita Taishin's
strength to never back down has always inspired
and encouraged her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All this time, I never lose faith in Narita Taishin
and wait for her return every day—until I finally
get the chance to give her some heartfelt
encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She rediscovers her will to keep fighting and vows
to make a comeback at the Nikkei Sho.
